high_risk_scenarios.name: Disconnect race
high_risk_scenarios.mitigation: Operation lease acquisition and generation check block provider calls after disconnect

high_risk_scenarios.name: Timeout and concurrency ambiguity
high_risk_scenarios.mitigation: Deterministic event ID, 409 insert reconciliation, version CAS, and idempotent delete

high_risk_scenarios.name: Reassignment and ownership corruption
high_risk_scenarios.mitigation: Private marker verification before patch/delete prevents mutating non-Teamfair events
